preferred_wording: Preserve medication names and exact doses

forbidden_literal_translations.Estoy constipado: Prefer context-aware clinical meaning, not a literal false friend
forbidden_literal_translations.Me duele el corazón: Prefer I have chest pain when symptom context indicates pain

preferred_discharge_wording: Return to the emergency department if symptoms worsen
preferred_medication_wording: Keep milligrams, micrograms, and units exact
preferred_tone: Professional, calm, empathetic, concise, and medically precise.
preferred_grammar: Use natural spoken target-language grammar; first person remains first person.
preferred_punctuation: Use plain punctuation suitable for speech synthesis; avoid semicolons.
preferred_capitalization: Use standard sentence case; preserve medication and proper-name capitalization.
